case_title: TAD V. NGUYEN VS. DOUG LEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, TAD V. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DOUG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $15.00) SERVED JUN-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DOUG
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-11-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TAD V. NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOUG LEE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. SETTLEMENT IS REACHED. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT OF $565.00. THE COURT WILL CONSIDER PUNITIVE DAMAGES ON EITHER SIDE IF PAYMENT IS NOT SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS SATISFIED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUGUST 11, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ARE SATISFIED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
